summary: Iteration 34 — Admin Test Mode (rate-limit bypass) tested end-to-end. 13/13 backend pytest assertions pass; frontend toggle round-trip (Off → Enable → ACTIVE with live countdown → Turn off → Off) verified via Playwright. Test mode left DISABLED on exit.

minor.issue: Spec says missing/invalid `minutes` returns 400, but implementation uses `int(payload.get('minutes') or 60)` so missing or 0 silently falls back to 60. Negative, >1440, and non-numeric correctly return 400. Acceptable by current code but does not fully match the stricter validation language in the spec.

action_items: Optional: tighten validation in admin_enable_test_mode so a missing `minutes` key returns 400 instead of defaulting to 60, to match the request spec.
critical_code_review_comments: patients.py POST /requests correctly checks `test_mode_until` BEFORE both the per-IP rate-limit branch (line ~120) and the per-email branch (line ~185). rate_cfg_doc is fetched once and reused — good.
admin.py POST test-mode endpoint also flushes intake_ip_log on enable (intentional per spec) — confirmed working.
GET admin/intake-rate-limit auto-clears `test_mode_until` from response when expired (until_dt <= now) — solid.
SettingsPanel ticks countdown locally every 1s and refetches on disable — UX flows cleanly.
test_credentials: Master admin password: admin123! (X-Admin-Password header / Master password tab on /admin)
seed_data_creation: None — only mutated app_config.intake_rate_limit.test_mode_until and cleared intake_ip_log (per design). Test mode left OFF on exit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified. Backend test file: test_iteration34_test_mode.py (13 tests, all green). Frontend test-mode card has data-testids: test-mode-card, test-mode-active-badge, test-mode-inactive-badge, test-mode-minutes-input, test-mode-enable-btn, test-mode-disable-btn. Settings panel is reached via 'More' dropdown in admin /admin/dashboard. Admin login: Master password tab → admin123!. Countdown verified to tick locally every 1s (59m 57s → 59m 54s after 2.2s wait).
rca of the issue: No issues found. Feature works as designed.
